use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH NEWLY DIAGNOSED ACUTE MYELOID LEUKEMIA (AML) WHO ARE FLT3 MUTATION-POSITIVE, IN COMBINATION WITH STANDARD CYTARABINE AND DAUNORUBICIN INDUCTION AND CYTARABINE CONSOLIDATION CHEMOTHERAPY
TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH AGGRESSIVE SYSTEMIC MASTOCYTOSIS (ASM), SYSTEMIC MASTOCYTOSIS WITH ASSOCIATED HEMATOLOGICAL NEOPLASM (SM-AHN), OR MAST CELL LEUKEMIA (MCL)
